stories.headline: Monitoring Analytics: PJM wholesale prices up 76% YoY, blames data centers; AEP threatens to exit
stories.summary: Monitoring Analytics' Q1 2026 State of the Market report, released Thursday, found PJM wholesale power cost rose to $136.53/MWh from $77.78 a year earlier and called the data-center-driven supply gap 'not adequate ... in the foreseeable future,' while AEP threatened to leave PJM in protest of the response.

stories.headline: Cassidy loses Louisiana primary; Letlow and Fleming advance to June 27 runoff
stories.summary: Trump-endorsed Rep. Julia Letlow led with 44% and former Rep. John Fleming took 28%, pushing Sen. Bill Cassidy (25%) out of contention five years after he voted to convict Trump in the second impeachment trial.

stories.headline: Senate GOP redrafts immigration reconciliation bill to strip $220M ballroom security funding
stories.summary: After moderates panicked over a surprise $1 billion Secret Service line item to 'harden' Trump's White House ballroom project, Senate Republican leaders moved Friday night to rewrite the ICE/Border Patrol reconciliation package ahead of next week's Byrd Bath and vote-a-rama.

stories.headline: U.S. and Nigerian forces kill senior ISIS commander Abu-Bilal al-Minuki
stories.summary: Trump announced on Truth Social Friday night that a joint operation killed al-Minuki, calling him a senior ISIS figure who helped plan operations targeting Americans in Africa.

stories.headline: Trump stands by Iran-war remarks; White House weighs beef-tariff executive order
stories.summary: Returning from Beijing to spiking inflation, Trump told Fox's Bret Baier he doesn't think about Americans' financial situations 'even a little bit' in the Iran context and would 'make it again,' while the WH considers easing beef tariffs over ranchers' objections.

stories.headline: POLITICO Poll: Israel splits MAGA from non-MAGA Trump voters
stories.summary: Nearly half of MAGA Trump voters back Israel's current government vs. 29% of non-MAGA Trump voters, and 41% of MAGA voters call Israel's Gaza campaign justified compared with 31% of non-MAGA voters, exposing a widening coalition rift.

stories.headline: PA-7 four-way Democratic primary Tuesday tests Bench-backed firefighter Bob Brooks
stories.summary: Bethlehem firefighter Bob Brooks (endorsed by Shapiro, Sanders, Deluzio, SEIU and Buttigieg) faces Ryan Crosswell, Lamont McClure and Carol Obando-Derstine in Tuesday's Lehigh Valley primary, with the winner taking on freshman Rep. Ryan Mackenzie (R) in a national bellwether race.

stories.headline: NJ Rep. LaMonica McIver pregnant amid 17-year federal assault charge over ICE facility clash
stories.summary: McIver (D-N.J.), charged with assaulting federal officers outside a New Jersey ICE detention facility and facing up to 17 years in prison, told People Magazine she is expecting her second child.

stories.headline: Aaron Rodgers re-signs with Steelers on 1-year deal up to $25M, expected at Monday's OTA
stories.summary: Rodgers agreed to a one-year contract with $22M guaranteed and incentives pushing the total to $25M, reuniting with new HC Mike McCarthy (his Green Bay coach 2006-18) and is expected at Pittsburgh's voluntary OTA opener Monday.

stories.headline: Phillies 6, Pirates 0: Sánchez fans career-high 13 in complete-game shutout
stories.summary: Cristopher Sánchez retired the first 11 Pirates and struck out 13 in his second career shutout, while rookie Braxton Chandler walked four in three innings (MLB-leading 31 BB on the season) as Pittsburgh dropped Saturday's game at PNC Park.

market_data.as_of: May 17 a.m. (PJM); WTI May 15 close; Henry Hub May 8 spot
